title: "He just kissed me": IShowSpeed left horrified as chaotic livestream moment explodes across social media
summary_full: A viral clip from IShowSpeed’s Dominican Republic livestream has sparked massive online discussion after a fan unexpectedly tried to kiss the streamer during a crowded bus interaction. Security quickly intervened, while the shocked creator repeatedly questioned what was happening on stream. The chaotic moment spread rapidly across Reddit and X, with many viewers defending Speed. The controversy grew further after xQc suggested the livestream’s reported 1.1 million viewers may have been inflated by bots.
